steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Compute indicators from provided data for Auren Energia (Dec 2024)
price=7.90
shares_issued=1050378000
treasury=5400000
outstanding=shares_issued - treasury
Revenue12=9143973000  # Receita Líquida (12 meses) approximated from dataset as 9,143,473,000
gross_profit=1329003000  # 'Lucro Bruto' for 2024? Wait 3.03 last penultimate; We need 2024 value. We'll use 1_429_003_000 from ÚLTIMO
gross_profit=1429003000  # from ÚLTIMO 2024- padrão
EBIT12=974938000
net_income12=271869000
AssetTotal=52754117000
current_assets=11137794000
current_liabilities=7148376000
fornecedores_current=1305510000
fornecedores=1305510000
fornecedores_long=0
long_term_debt=7577280000
short_term_debt=2709962000
# debt brutto
d_bruta = short_term_debt + long_term_debt
# cash
cash=7200549000
cash_eq=cash
investments=2629000
avail=cash+investments
# equity
Equity=14483354000
# Invested Capital (as defined: Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
Invested = AssetTotal - fornecedores + 0 - cash
Invested

print("outstanding", outstanding)
print("Market cap", price*outstanding)
print("Revenue12", Revenue12)
print("Gross Profit", gross_profit)
print("EBIT12", EBIT12)
print("Net income12", net_income12)
print("AssetTotal", AssetTotal)
print("Current assets", current_assets, "current liabilities", current_liabilities)
print("Dibta bruta", d_bruta)
print("Avail", avail)
print("Equity", Equity)
print("Invested", Invested)
# ROIC
ROIC = EBIT12 / Invested
# ROE
ROE = net_income12 / Equity
# Asset turnover
AT = Revenue12 / AssetTotal
print("Invested", Invested, "ROIC", ROIC, "ROE", ROE, "AT", AT)
# EPS and LPA
EPS = net_income12 / outstanding
LPA = EPS
EPS, LPA
# Book value per share
VPA_per_share = Equity / shares_issued
P_VP = price / VPA_per_share
P_EBIT = price / (EBIT12 / outstanding)
PSR = price / (Revenue12 / outstanding)
P_Ativos = price / (AssetTotal / shares_issued)
P_CapGiro = price / ((current_assets - current_liabilities) / shares_issued)
P_AtivCircLiq = P_CapGiro
P_L = price / EPS
print("EPS", EPS, "LPA", LPA, "VPA_per_share", VPA_per_share, "P/VP", P_VP, "P/EBIT", P_EBIT, "PSR", PSR, "P/Ativos", P_Ativos, "P/CAP.GIRO", P_CapGiro, "P/AtivCircLiq", P_AtivCircLiq, "P/L", P_L)
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Compute precise margins and ratios with two decimals
Revenue12 = 9143973000.0
Gross = 1429003000.0
EBIT12 = 974938000.0
NetInc = 271869000.0
AssetTotal = 52754117000.0
CurrAssets = 11137794000.0
CurrLiab = 7148376000.0
SharesIssued = 1050378000.0
Treasury = 5400000.0
Out = SharesIssued - Treasury
Price = 7.9
Equity = 14483354000.0
DebtBruta = 2709622000.0 + 7577280000.0  # short + long
Avail = 7200549000.0 + 2629000.0
Cash = 7200549000.0
Invested = AssetTotal - 1305510000.0 - Cash
LPA = NetInc / Out
EPS = LPA
VPA = Equity / SharesIssued
PVP = Price / (VPA)
PAtivos = Price / (AssetTotal / SharesIssued)
PCapGiro = Price / ((CurrAssets - CurrLiab) / Out)
PcapLiq = PCapGiro
PSR = Price / (Revenue12 / Out)
P_EBIT = Price / (EBIT12 / Out)
P_L = Price / (NetInc / Out)
MargBruta = (Gross / Revenue12) * 100
MargEBIT = (EBIT12 / Revenue12) * 100
MargLiquida = (NetInc / Revenue12) * 100
EBITAtivo = (EBIT12 / AssetTotal) * 100
ROIC = (EBIT12 / (Invested := AssetTotal - 1305510000.0 - Cash)) * 100
ROE = (NetInc / Equity) * 100
GiroAtivos = Revenue12 / AssetTotal
DivaBrPatrim = (DebtBruta / Equity)
EV = Price * Out + (DebtBruta)  # rough??
EVEBITDA =  ( (Price*Out) + DebtBruta ) / (EBIT12) # naive
print("LPA", round(LPA, 4))
print("P/L", round(P_L, 2))
print("P/EBIT", round(P_EBIT, 2))
print("PSR", round(PSR, 2))
print("MargBruta", round(MargBruta, 2))
print("MargEBIT", round(MargEBIT, 2))
print("MargLiquida", round(MargLiquida, 2))
print("ROIC ", round(ROIC,2))
print("ROE ", round(ROE,2))
print("Giro Ativos", round(GiroAtivos,4))
print("P/VP", round(Price / (VPA), 2))
print("VPA", VPA)
print("LPA per share", NetInc / Out)
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
